title: alisma submersum var. arcuatum
intro: Alisma submersum var. arcuatum, also known as the water plantain or Chinese water plantain, is a type of aquatic plant native to East Asia, characterized by its oval-shaped leaves and white or yellowish flowers. Traditionally, it has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Alisma submersum var. arcuatum include reducing fluid retention, alleviating edema, and treating various kidney and urinary disorders. Alisma submersum var. arcuatum is commonly prepared as a dried root or in herbal tea, capsule, or tincture forms, often in combination with other herbs for enhanced medicinal effects.
